awesome-project

A high-performance library for building scalable web applications with TypeScript and modern tooling.

Features

  • Zero-config setup with sensible defaults for common use cases
  • Built-in TypeScript support with comprehensive type definitions
  • Hot module replacement for rapid development iteration cycles
  • Tree-shaking support for minimal production bundle sizes
  • Plugin architecture for extending core functionality

Installation

npm install awesome-project

Quick Start

Create a new project with the following configuration to get started immediately.

import { createApp } from 'awesome-project';

const app = createApp({
  port: 3000,
  middleware: ['cors', 'compression'],
});

app.get('/api/hello', (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Hello World' });
});

app.listen();

Configuration

The library supports extensive configuration through a simple configuration object. All options have sensible defaults, so you only need to specify what you want to change.

Option Type Default Description
port number 3000 Server listening port
host string localhost Server hostname
middleware string[] [] Built-in middleware to enable

API Reference

createApp(options)

Creates a new application instance with the specified configuration options. Returns an application object with methods for defining routes and middleware.

app.get(path, handler)

Registers a GET route handler for the specified path. The handler receives request and response objects following standard conventions.

Contributing

We welcome contributions from the community. Please read our contributing guidelines before submitting a pull request to ensure a smooth review process.

License

About

A high-performance TypeScript web framework

typescript web-framework nodejs
